summary: cosmic-script is a novel-to-screenplay converter using LLM (litellm). Key models: Screenplay (scenes + elements), Scene (heading + content), ScreenplayElement (element_type + text). Fountain export in export/fountain.py. Analysis module in analysis/ has pacing.py (takes Screenplay), coverage.py, logline.py, voice.py. Existing quality checks in conversion/quality.py (takes raw text + scene dicts). Tests use pytest, fixtures in tests/fixtures/. Demo mode returns mock output without API calls.
currentTask: Create quality regression test suite: 5 fixture files, quality_metrics.py in analysis/, test_quality_regression.py with tests using model="demo"
plan: TDD approach: 1) Create fixture files 2) Write test_quality_regression.py (Red) 3) Create quality_metrics.py (Green) 4) Verify all tests pass 5) Commit+push
